email_subject: Sollicitatie — Junior Search Engine Advertising Executive
email_body:
Beste Square Melon,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Junior Search Engine Advertising Executive. Uw focus op Google Ads en SEA sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en mijn groeiende kennis van betaalde zoekcampagnes.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, beheer ik Google Ads-accounts en optimaliseer ik campagnes op basis van data. Ik heb ervaring met het opzetten van zoekwoordenonderzoek, het schrijven van advertentieteksten en het analyseren van prestaties via Google Analytics en Search Console. Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en technische SEO toegepast, wat mijn analytische en nauwkeurige werkwijze versterkt.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om het officiële Google Adwords Professional-certificaat te behalen en mijn kennis van SEA te verdiepen. Mijn B1 Nederlands is in ontwikkeling; ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn bijdrage te leveren aan het Google Business Generator team.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Square Melon,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Search Engine Advertising Executive position. Your focus on Google Ads and SEA aligns perfectly with my experience in digital marketing and my growing knowledge of paid search campaigns.

In my current role at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, manage Google Ads accounts, and optimize campaigns based on data. I have experience with keyword research, writing ad copy, and analyzing performance via Google Analytics and Search Console. Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data and technical SEO, which strengthens my analytical and precise working style.

I am motivated to obtain the official Google Adwords Professional certificate and deepen my SEA knowledge. My Dutch is at B1 level and I am currently taking classes to improve further.

I look forward to contributing to the Google Business Generator team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Junior Search Engine Advertising Executive bij Square Melon. Uw oproep voor een gedreven starter met interesse in digitale marketing en Google Ads sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het beheren van Google Ads-campagnes en het optimaliseren van zoekwoorden en advertentieteksten. Ik werk dagelijks met Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush en Ahrefs om prestaties te meten en campagnes te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij een solide basis gegeven in SEA en datagestuurde marketing.

Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com uitgebreide ervaring opgedaan met technische SEO, gestructureerde data en GEO. Ik heb geleerd hoe ik websites optimaliseer voor zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines, wat mijn analytische en nauwkeurige werkwijze versterkt.

Ik herken mij in uw profielschets: ik ben kwaliteitsbewust, werk zelfstandig en heb een commerciële instelling. Mijn passie voor het internet en digitale marketing drijft mij om continu bij te leren. Ik ben gemotiveerd om het officiële Google Adwords Professional-certificaat te behalen en mijn kennis van SEA te verdiepen binnen uw team.

Mijn Nederlands is op B1-niveau en ik volg lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn bijdrage te leveren aan het Google Business Generator team en mee te groeien met Square Melon.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Junior Search Engine Advertising Executive position at Square Melon. Your call for a motivated starter with an interest in digital marketing and Google Ads aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, managing Google Ads campaigns, and optimizing keywords and ad copy. I work daily with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to measure performance and improve campaigns. This experience has given me a solid foundation in SEA and data-driven marketing.

Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I have gained extensive experience with technical SEO, structured data, and GEO. I have learned how to optimize websites for both traditional and AI-powered search engines, which strengthens my analytical and precise working style.

I recognize myself in your profile: I am quality-conscious, work independently, and have a commercial mindset. My passion for the internet and digital marketing drives me to continuously learn. I am motivated to obtain the official Google Adwords Professional certificate and deepen my SEA knowledge within your team.

My Dutch is at B1 level and I am taking classes to improve further. I speak fluent English and Turkish.

I look forward to contributing to the Google Business Generator team and growing with Square Melon.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Experience managing Google Ads accounts and optimizing campaigns (Episto)
Hands-on with keyword research, ad copy, and performance analysis via Google Analytics & Search Console
Strong analytical and precise working style, demonstrated through technical SEO/GEO audits
Motivated to obtain Google Adwords Professional certificate and deepen SEA expertise
Passion for digital marketing and the internet, with a commercial and independent mindset
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- SEA & PPC: Google Ads campaign management, keyword research, ad copywriting, performance optimization, Google Analytics, Google Search Console
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
